steps.title: for 96 samples using the P20 Multi-channel pipette
steps.instruction: for 96 samples using the P20 Multi-channel pipette. --- * [P20 Multi-channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * [10/20uL Opentrons tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips) * [Labcon 0.2mL PCR strips #3940-550](http://www.labcon.com/microstrips.html) * Labcon Plate * PCR Cooler --- Slot

steps.title: 96-well PCR plate on PCR Cooler...
steps.instruction: 96-well PCR plate on PCR Cooler (filled with sample from previous step). Slot

steps.title: PCR strip on PCR Cooler placed...
steps.instruction: PCR strip on PCR Cooler placed in column 1 and filled with master mix Slots 4-11: [10/20ul Opentrons tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips)

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
